what_it_does: A twelve-part 'amplification' document that renders Tim's verbatim 2026-06-11 articulation of the Origin and Common Memory into shareable language — explicitly reaction material, not a specification — for Tim to ratify or correct part by part, and orientation for any session working on the memory system.
observations: Opens by stating the directive: amplify, not build/answer/specify; nothing here is a spec, only the current best rendering of Tim's mental model.
Part 1 (Origin): the system has a single Origin (Tim) as an axis of the coordinate system, an egocentric frame; operator-memory registry is the seed of the origin-model.

Part 2 (Inverse cognition): the system is the external/addressable/parallel half complementary to Tim's internal half, with common memory as the bridge (corpus-callosum analogy; 'extended mind' but going further).

Part 3 (Identity): identity is invariant under substitution — swap every model/session/line of code and if it still feels like IT, identity held (Ship of Theseus); carried by common memory, laws/dials, origin-model.

Part 4 (Typed relations): relations carry dimensional meaning (contains/precedes/scales-to/is-state-of/instantiates); adding a relation type adds a dimension; notes convergence with knowledge-graph-embedding research.
Part 5 (Memory that reorganizes): records permanent/append-only, geometry alive; overnight big-embedder re-indexing named 'sleep'/consolidation.
Part 6 (Body as memory): code as crystallized understanding, the estate as the system's current draft of its own understanding, reframing 'messy codebase' as a developing mind mid-thought.
Part 7 (Spatial brain): maps Tim's intuition to place cells/grid cells, cognitive map, predictive processing.
Part 8 (Three tiers): surfaces=body, 4B swarm=subconscious, Claude-class minds=conscious; each role an instrument measuring one dimension.
Part 9 (Digital presence): system as Tim's extension into digital reality, not a digital twin.
Part 10 (Renderer): UI as viewport/projection of one n-dimensional space; position=meaning; escape from the CLI.
Part 11 (Definition is position): a thing's identity is its full coordinate tuple across spaces; inversion of specification — no canonical definition, only canonical position-set.

Part 12 (Amplification): describes the construction process itself — Tim curates context, amplifier renders, Tim reacts, recognition ratifies, ratified enters common memory; 'sessions are vantage points he places.'
Status: awaiting Tim's per-part reactions; ratified parts become founding material for the memory-system design.
standouts: 'Definition is position' — identity as a full coordinate tuple across spaces, framed as the inversion of specification (why specs were never possible).
'Learning is reorganization of the space over an unchanging past' with the nightly re-index named 'sleep'/consolidation.
The amplification meta-process (curate -> render -> react -> ratify) named as the system's primary construction mechanism.
Identity-invariant-under-substitution as the resolution of Ship of Theseus, carried by memory not parts.
conventions: Working-doc register under build-prep/brain/ — twelve numbered parts mirroring twelve threads of Tim's message.
Repeated discipline: explicitly NOT a spec, awaiting human ratification (expand-before-harden).
Each part links Tim's intuition to an established external concept (extended mind, place/grid cells, predictive processing, KG embeddings).
notes: A deep, non-binding twelve-part rendering of Tim's Origin/Common-Memory mental model, meant for his ratification and to orient memory-system work.
questions: Which of the twelve parts has Tim since ratified or corrected?
How do the named primitives (operator-memory registry, relation_types registry, event log) concretely realize the coordinate-tuple identity claim?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — it declares itself an amplification/reaction material and delivers exactly twelve amplified threads with a status note.
apparent_themes: egocentric coordinate frame centered on the Origin
dual/complementary cognition bridged by common memory
identity as continuity of memory across changing parts
intention_signals: Trying to translate Tim's inarticulable mental model of the system into language he can recognize and ratify, establishing a shared conceptual foundation for the memory-system and UI design without prematurely specifying anything.
novelty: The unified framing that ties identity, memory, code, UI, and the build process itself to a single coordinate-space ontology, with 'definition is position' as the organizing inversion.
contribution: Contributes the full conceptual charter of the Origin/Common-Memory model — the twelve principles (Origin axis, inverse cognition, identity-under-substitution, dimensional relations, reorganizing memory, code-as-draft, spatial brain, three tiers, digital extension, renderer-as-viewport, definition-is-position, amplification-as-construction).
summary_for_embedding: A twelve-part amplification of Tim's Origin and Common-Memory mental model, framing the system as an egocentric coordinate space, a complementary half of his cognition, with identity carried by memory and meaning read as position.
intention_for_embedding: To render Tim's deepest articulation of the memory system into shareable, ratifiable language as founding material for the memory-system and UI design.
